<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Traits; use Predis\Command\Command; use UnexpectedValueException; /** * @mixin Command */ trait Storedist { public function setArguments(array $arguments) { $argumentsLength = count($arguments); if ( static::$storeDistArgumentPositionOffset >= $argumentsLength || false === $arguments[static::$storeDistArgumentPositionOffset] ) { parent::setArguments($arguments); return; } $argument = $arguments[static::$storeDistArgumentPositionOffset]; if (true === $argument) { $argument = 'STOREDIST'; } else { throw new UnexpectedValueException('Wrong STOREDIST argument type'); } $argumentsBefore = array_slice($arguments, 0, static::$storeDistArgumentPositionOffset); $argumentsAfter = array_slice($arguments, static::$storeDistArgumentPositionOffset + 1); parent::setArguments(array_merge($argumentsBefore, [$argument], $argumentsAfter)); } }
